turns.player_input: where were you when it happened?
turns.npc_reply: I was in the drawing room with the other guests, apart from five minutes around twenty to ten when I went down the back stairs to the cellar for more wine. You can ask any of them.

turns.player_input: what about the wine and the money?
turns.npc_reply: Down the back stairs, two bottles of the Margaux, back up. Five minutes, perhaps seven; the cellar is cold, one doesn't linger. I caught my thumb on the door latch coming out, clumsy of me.
If it's my work you're asking about, Inspector, say so plainly and I shall answer plainly.
